AttendanceRecord.title: AttendanceRecord
AttendanceRecord.description: An individual employee attendance entry containing selfie, GPS, and timestamp.

employeeName.description: The full name of the employee entered manually

type.description: The session type: arrival or departure

photo.description: Base64 string representing the captured selfie webcam photo

timestamp.description: The date and time of the attendance in ISO format

attendance.description: Collection of all employee attendance submissions
